title: Reconcile promotion outcome to done and prove registry extensibility
description: Add reconcilePromotions(projectRoot): for each Finding whose promotesTo.status === 'launched', read the linked run's run-state.json via src/state/run-state.ts readRunState; when the run reached 'completed' transition the Finding in-progress->done (supersede) and set promotesTo.status='completed'; when 'aborted'/'failed' set promotesTo.status='aborted' and return the Finding to 'open'; 'running' leaves it unchanged. Expose it via `bober do --reconcile` and call it best-effort at the start of every `bober do`. Prove extensibility by registering a second stub promoter under a different PromoterKey and asserting unsupported (domain,kind) pairs fail closed. Add docs/do-bridge.md describing the promoter-registry extension point.

successCriteria.description: `npm run build` (tsc) finishes with zero type errors after reconcilePromotions, the `--reconcile` flag, the second stub promoter, and docs are added.
Given a Finding with promotesTo.status 'launched' and a run-state fake reporting status 'completed', reconcilePromotions transitions the finding to 'done' and sets promotesTo.status 'completed'.

Given a run-state fake reporting 'aborted', reconcilePromotions returns the finding to status 'open' and sets promotesTo.status 'aborted'; given 'running' it leaves the finding at 'in-progress' unchanged.

A second stub promoter registered under PromoterKey {domain:'projects', kind:'action'} resolves for a projects/action finding, while registry.resolve() for an unregistered (domain,kind) returns undefined and `bober do` then exits non-zero with a message naming the (domain,kind).
docs/do-bridge.md exists and documents the PromoterRegistry.register extension point (the register call site and the Promoter interface) for adding future medical/financial promoters.

nonGoals: Do not implement medical or financial promoters - only document the extension point and add a non-functional stub for the test.
Do not poll or block waiting for an in-flight run to finish - reconcile reads the current run-state.json snapshot and returns immediately.
Do not delete or rewrite history.jsonl or progress.md.
Do not change the Sprint 1/2 public types or the approval-marker format.
stopConditions: `npm run build` passes and `npm test -- src/do-bridge` shows completed->done, aborted->open, and running->unchanged transitions plus the unsupported-(domain,kind) path returning undefined.
definitionOfDone: After a promoted coding run finishes, `bober do --reconcile` (and the next `bober do`) reads the run's run-state.json and advances the linked Finding from in-progress to done, recording the terminal outcome on promotesTo; an aborted run returns the Finding to open and a running one is left alone. A second registered promoter demonstrates the registry accepts new domains, an unregistered pair fails closed, and docs/do-bridge.md shows a maintainer exactly where to register medical/financial promoters later.
assumptions: Run terminal state is readable via src/state/run-state.ts readRunState; RunSpawner writes running->aborted there (run-spawner.ts:160-167) and the pipeline writes completed.
Marking a Finding done = supersede bitemporal close (src/state/facts.ts:291) per research §3a line 131 'Completion = supersede', applied through the FindingStore port update method.
Best-effort start-of-command reconcile mirrors the seedProjectFacts try/catch in src/orchestrator/pipeline.ts:981 (a reconcile failure must never abort `bober do`).
generatorNotes: reconcilePromotions iterates findings that have an active promotesTo via the FindingStore port; map run-state.status -> finding transition (completed->done, aborted/failed->open, running->no-op). Use the port's update method (supersede semantics from src/state/facts.ts:291) to persist. Wire `--reconcile` as a commander flag on `bober do`; also call reconcile at the start of the normal handler wrapped in best-effort try/catch (mirror seedProjectFacts in src/orchestrator/pipeline.ts:981) so a missing/corrupt run-state never throws. The second stub promoter exists only to prove registration; mark it non-functional in code comments. docs/do-bridge.md should mirror the structure/length of docs/teams.md or docs/chat-steer.md and name the exact register() call site.
evaluatorNotes: Verify the three run-state -> finding transitions with a run-state fake, extensibility resolution plus fail-closed on an unregistered pair, and that reconcile never throws on a missing run-state file. Confirm docs/do-bridge.md names the register() call site and the Promoter interface.
